facts: NIT Calicut (National Institute of Technology Calicut, NITC) is located at NIT Campus P.O., Kattangal, Mukkam Road, Kozhikode-673601, Kerala.
Languages spoken locally: Malayalam, Hindi, English. Languages spoken in college: Malayalam, Telugu, Hindi, Tamil, English.
Climate: Tropical monsoon climate with high humidity, hot summers, and heavy rainfall.
Calicut International Airport (Karipur, Kerala) is 20.2 km from NIT Calicut.
Kozhikode Railway Station is 19 km from NIT Calicut.
NITC Bus Stop is 800 m from NIT Calicut campus.
NIT Calicut has multiple boys hostels organized by year.
1st year boys (juniors) are allotted Hostel A, Hostel B, or Hostel C with 3 sharing per room.
2nd and 3rd year boys are allotted Mega Hostels with 2 sharing per room.
4th year boys are allotted Old Mega Hostels, Hostel E, or Hostel D with single rooms.
PG students are allotted PG1 or PG2 with single rooms.
NIT Calicut has 3 girls hostels: MLH (Mega Ladies Hostel), Hostel F, and Hostel G.
1st year students (juniors): 3 per room.
2nd and 3rd year students (seniors): 2 per room.
4th year students: Single room.
PG students: Single room.
Hostel seat rent is Rs 12,000 per semester (charged extra, not included in tuition fee totals).

category_1_open_ews_obc_above_5L.description: Open/EWS/OBC with family income above Rs 5 lakh + DASA(CIWG)/MEA

other_fees_winter.note: Only Registration, Examination, Activities, Career Development, and Computing fees charged in winter semester

category_2_open_ews_obc_1_to_5L.description: Open/EWS/OBC with family income Rs 1-5 lakh

category_3_below_1L_sc_st_ph.description: Open/EWS/OBC with family income below Rs 1 lakh + SC/ST/PH

fee_structure.notes: Hostel seat rent Rs 12,000 per semester is extra and not included in totals above. Some fees are annual and charged only in the Monsoon semester.

facts: WiFi and LAN are both available at NIT Calicut.
NIT Calicut has a unique attendance range: Maximum 80%, Minimum 70%.
This differs from most NITs which have a flat 75% requirement.
Ragam: Cultural fest of NIT Calicut.
Tathva: Technical fest of NIT Calicut.
Washing machines are available in NIT Calicut hostels.
Election positions at NIT Calicut: General Secretary (Gen Sec), UGAS, Technical Affairs Council, Student Affairs Council.
Cricket, Volleyball, Kho-Kho, Kabaddi, Football, and Badminton are available at NIT Calicut.
5 canteens on NIT Calicut campus: Milma, Swadhistam, Cochin, Samtrupthi, and Amul.
COPS (Co-operative Store) is available on NIT Calicut campus.
Late entry after 12 AM midnight more than 3 times: Rs 1,000 fine.
Losing ID card: Rs 1,000 fine.
Two gyms available at NIT Calicut: NITC Gym and Mega Gym.
Health Center is available on NIT Calicut campus.

nearby: Over The Moon (OTM) on Kattangal, Mukkam Road

facts: Local languages: Malayalam, Hindi, English.
College languages: Malayalam, Telugu, Hindi, Tamil, English.
Tropical monsoon climate with high humidity, hot summers, and heavy rainfall.
